name: @seongqkim/cockpit
description: Markdown cockpit for AI-agent work with concise status docs, Korean batch dashboards, validation gates, and strict hooks.
author: SeongQ Kim <foxion37@gmail.com>

scripts.lint: biome check package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts src test
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts src test
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && npm run lint && npm run build
